# Rules for src/lib/fileTree.ts

<!-- Generated by proofd. Source: src/lib/fileTree.ts. Do not edit manually. -->

## Activity Panel (activity-panel)

- [AP-02] buildFileTree() in fileTree.ts builds a unified hierarchical FileTreeNode tree from a Map<path, FileActivity> and a workspaceDir. All files (workspace-internal and external) are placed in a single tree rooted at the deepest common ancestor. The workspace directory node is marked with isWorkspaceRoot=true for accent styling. For worktree workspaces, the workspace root uses the project name via parseWorktreePath(). Single-child directory chains are compressed (VSCode compact-folders style), but compression never collapses through the workspace root. Nodes sorted: directories first, then case-insensitive alphabetical. flattenTree() and allFolderPaths() are companion utilities for rendering and auto-expand.
